objective: mathcrew PR#28 Speech Bubble 기반 교육콘텐츠 전달방식 검토 + 현재 기술스택(Three.js 0.183.2 + WebGL2 + TS + Bun + Vite + ts-fsrs) 위에서 최신/최선의 교육콘텐츠 전달방식 리서치

designPrinciples.ddd: Content delivery uses domain vocabulary (TeachingBeat, CRAMicroPhase, SpeechBubbleContent). Dispatch logic maps teaching concepts to rendering, not raw tech.
designPrinciples.dry: Single ContentDeliveryResolver dispatches to appropriate renderer. No duplicate rendering logic.
designPrinciples.ocp: Open for new rendering approaches (troika, CSS3D) via Interface. Closed for core speech bubble contract.
designPrinciples.pecs: Producer (game-loop) extends TeachingBeat with new fields. Consumer (renderers) reads via supertype.

stackRecommendation.label: Enhanced CSS Overlay (Speech Bubble++)
stackRecommendation.description: Enrich existing CSS speech bubble with CSS-native animations, CognitiveLoadManager (adaptive content density), modality flags (phase icons, vocabulary highlights, progress arc), and audio narration (Mayer P9). Zero WebGL render loop changes.

alternative.label: Hybrid Diegetic + Overlay
alternative.description: Phase 3 evolution: add troika-three-text SDF labels for in-world spatial annotations on motivate/explain/demonstrate phases. CSS overlay retained for practice/assess. ContentDeliveryResolver dispatches per CRA phase.
alternative.whenToAdopt: When CRA Concrete phase demands spatial labels near 3D manipulatives (Mayer Spatial Contiguity)

disqualified.label: Full WebGL-Native Content (three-mesh-ui)
disqualified.reason: three-mesh-ui abandoned (last release 2021). WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility contradictions unresolved. SpeechBubbleContent contract breakage required.

forwardProp.primaryChain: TeachingBeat → ContentDeliveryResolver → SpeechBubbleContent → speech-bubble.ts → CSS DOM
forwardProp.phase3Chain: TeachingBeat → ContentDeliveryResolver → [troika labels | CSS overlay] → visual output

backwardProp.chain: User interaction → ContentEngagement → FSRS review signal → mastery update → content delivery refinement

phase1_goldenTables.name: H-A CSS Animation Baseline
deliverables: CSS keyframe animations (fade-in, slide-up, pulse) with prefers-reduced-motion gate
Phase-based accent coloring via data-phase attribute
Browser validation: NE-02 CSS z-order vs postprocessing canvas

phase2_operationalDecisionMaking.name: Audio Narration + Scaffold Escalation
deliverables: AudioNarrationSegment per TeachingBeat (Mayer P9, d=0.87 effect size)
Web Speech API Korean TTS or pre-recorded audio segments
ScaffoldEscalationLogic 4-tier: nudge → visual hint → worked example → direct instruction
SpatialSignalling for scaffold tiers 1-2 (3D glow, particle trails)

phase3_aiFirst.name: Hybrid Diegetic + Adaptive Content
deliverables: troika-three-text SDF labels for SpatialAnnotation (if n8ao benchmark passes)
CognitiveLoadManager feedback loop via FSRS mastery data
A/B testing framework for content delivery mode effectiveness

keyInsights: 현재 Speech Bubble 접근방식은 교육학적으로 올바름 (Mayer P8 Segmenting + CLT learner-controlled pacing)
가장 높은 ROI 개선: 한국어 오디오 내레이션 추가 (Mayer P9 Temporal Contiguity, d=0.87)
troika-three-text는 postprocessing과 호환 (OverrideMaterialManager workaround) — Phase 3 후보
렌더링 방식보다 설계 품질(CTML 원칙 준수)이 인지부하를 더 크게 좌우함 (clm-ext-27)
초등 교육에서는 Diegetic UI보다 Spatial UI(비디에제틱)가 적합 — 이중 인지처리 부담 감소
three-mesh-ui는 3년 이상 방치 → 신규 프로젝트에 부적합
